rationale: The citing paper’s core objective is to decompose dynamic promotion effects (including stockpiling/consumption timing), and the cited paper directly studies pre- and postpromotion dips and their determinants—mechanisms that are conceptually central to that decomposition problem. Given this strong construct overlap (temporary promotions, dips, stockpiling) and the citing note’s framing as extending prior promotion-decomposition work, this is not a safe obvious-mention-only drop.
